summary: Implemented SocialCard component with circular avatar (40x40), initials fallback (extracts first 2 letters from name), engagement metrics (likes with ThumbsUp icon, comments with MessageSquare icon), and 3-line content truncation. Component uses NativeWind/Tailwind CSS classes for theme compliance (no hardcoded colors), includes comprehensive test coverage (39 tests), and Storybook stories demonstrating all variants (with/without avatar, with/without metrics, long content). All verification gates passed: typecheck ✅, lint ✅, tests ✅ (953 total passed).
